name: Blackout Aruba Window Curtain Panel - Threshold™
description:
Add a touch of functional style to any room in your home with the Aruba Blackout Curtain Panel from Threshold™. This blackout curtain panel helps keep out the bright light of the sun during the day and provides you with privacy at night. The curtain panel is designed with a rod pocket at the top that makes it incredibly easy to hang with a curtain rod. Made with a subtly textured fabric and a solid-colored design for a pop of simple style, you can use this curtain with a curtain tieback to frame a window or let it hang free for a more casual look.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
